data.title: MindGym Returns to Profitability Amid Strategic Shift
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Mind Gym ( (GB:MIND) ) has provided an announcement.

MindGym has announced its audited results for the year ending March 31, 2025, highlighting a return to adjusted EBITDA profitability as it transitions from an episodic training provider to a behavior change partner. Despite a 14% decline in revenue to £38.6 million, the company achieved a £1.9 million adjusted EBITDA profit, a significant improvement from the previous year’s loss. Strategic initiatives include launching subscription solutions, signing new technology partnerships, and introducing new products like the AI-based coaching tool Lio. The company is focusing on scalable growth, aligning products with its High-Performance Behaviour Model, and accelerating digitization efforts. While facing challenging market conditions, particularly in the US, MindGym remains optimistic about modest revenue growth in FY26 and aims for a 10% CAGR in the medium term.

Spark’s Take on GB:MIND Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:MIND is a Neutral.

Mind Gym’s overall score of 48 reflects significant financial challenges, including declining revenues and profitability issues. While technical indicators suggest a bearish trend, the company’s strategic initiatives, including a return to adjusted EBITDA profitability and leadership enhancements, provide some optimism. However, concerns about valuation and lack of dividend yield remain.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:MIND stock, click here.

More about Mind Gym

MindGym is a company that delivers business improvement solutions using scalable, proprietary products based on behavioral science. The Group operates in three global markets: business transformation, human capital management, and learning & development. MindGym is listed on the London Stock Exchange Alternative Investment Market and is headquartered in London, with offices in New York and Singapore.

Average Trading Volume: 5,661

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: £17.04M

See more data about MIND stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from Aega ASA ( (DE:82T0) ) is now available.

Nordic Financials ASA, a financial services company based in Oslo, Norway, is conducting a rights issue to raise between NOK 20 million and NOK 30 million by issuing up to 2 billion new shares. data.title: Australia’s Inflation Expectations Surge: Market Impacts Loom
data.description:
Today, the Consumer Inflation Expectation for June was released in Australia, revealing a significant rise. The reported figure stood at 5.0%, surpassing the anticipated 4.0% and marking an increase from the previous month’s 4.1%. This unexpected jump indicates a growing concern about inflationary pressures in the Australian economy, as consumers anticipate higher prices in the near future.

Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

This surge in inflation expectations could have notable implications for the Australian stock market. Investors might become cautious, fearing that persistent inflation could lead to tighter monetary policies by the Reserve Bank of Australia. Such measures could include interest rate hikes, which typically dampen stock market enthusiasm as borrowing costs rise. Consequently, sectors sensitive to interest rates, such as real estate and consumer goods, might experience increased volatility. Investors will likely keep a close watch on future economic indicators to gauge the central bank’s potential response to these inflationary trends.

data.title: Surprise Dip in Inflation Rate Sparks Market Optimism
data.description:
Today, the latest inflation rate for May was released, revealing a month-over-month increase of 0.1%. This figure fell short of the anticipated 0.2% and also marked a decline from the previous month’s rate of 0.2%. The lower-than-expected inflation rate suggests a slowdown in price increases, which could have various implications for the economy and financial markets.

Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

For stock market investors, this unexpected dip in the inflation rate could be seen as a positive signal. Lower inflation may ease concerns about potential interest rate hikes by the Federal Reserve, which often aims to curb inflation by raising rates. As a result, stocks could become more attractive, potentially boosting market confidence and encouraging investment. However, investors will likely remain cautious, keeping an eye on future economic indicators to gauge the overall economic health and the Fed’s next moves.

Duskin Co., Ltd. ( (JP:4665) ) has shared an announcement.

Duskin Co., Ltd. has announced its Medium-Term Business Plan 2028, following the completion of its long-term strategy ONE DUSKIN. The new plan, Do-Connect, aims to adapt to Japan’s changing business environment by focusing on human resource development and corporate culture. Despite a 15.7% increase in net sales, the company faced a decline in operating profit due to rising costs. The new plan seeks to explore new business opportunities, expand related businesses, and excel in existing operations, with a focus on enhancing customer touchpoints and business efficiency.

More about Duskin Co., Ltd.

Duskin Co., Ltd. operates in the service industry, primarily offering cleaning and hygiene-related services. The company is known for its Mister Donut franchise and focuses on expanding its business portfolio to include disaster risk reduction support services and digital technology integration.
